bupt.ta.llm

类 SseEmitter

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.llm.SseEmitter

  • public final class SseEmitter
extends java.lang.Object
    Thin Server-Sent Events helper used by the streaming LLM endpoints.

    Event shapes the front-end expects:

    • event: chunk — payload {"text":"..."}, one per delta token
    • event: done — payload {"ok":true}
    • event: error — payload {"ok":false,"error":"message"}

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      SseEmitter(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
      Prepares the response for Server-Sent Events streaming.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void sendChunk(java.lang.String text) 
      void sendDone()
      Emits a done event with {"ok":true}.
      void sendError(java.lang.String message) 

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 构造器详细资料

      • SseEmitter

        public SseEmitter(javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
           throws java.io.IOException
        Prepares the response for Server-Sent Events streaming.
        参数:
        response - servlet response to configure
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if the writer cannot be opened

    • 方法详细资料

      • sendChunk

        public void sendChunk(java.lang.String text)
        参数:
        text - token delta to send as a chunk event (ignored when blank)

      • sendDone

        public void sendDone()
        Emits a done event with {"ok":true}.

      • sendError

        public void sendError(java.lang.String message)
        参数:
        message - error text for the error event payload
